name: Lucia, Luna, Liv, Bianca, Ishmael, Lamia, Vera, Karenina, Lilith, Teddy, Alisa, Cradle - All in one party.
description:
The Lasting Bonds Gathering / Lucia - Luna - Liv - Bianca - Ishmael - Lamia - Vera - Karenina - Lilith - Teddy - Alisa - Cradle, all from "Punishing: Gray Raven"
